question: Who’s son was Hosea (Hos 1:1)?
What came to Hosea son of Beeri (Hos 1:1)?
What was the first things the Lord commanded Hosea to do (Hos 1:2)?
options: Strike his staff on the gate three times
Tell Uzziah he needed to repent

question: Why was Hosea to marry an adulterous wife (Hos 1:2)?
options: Because the land was adulterous departing from the Lord
Because Israel had rejected the Lord and wanted to go back to Egypt
Because the priests were adulterating the sacrifices
Because the temple of God’s presence had been defiled by the kings

question: Gomer was the daugther of ________ (Hos 1:3)
What was the name of Hosea’s first son (Hos 1:4)?
Who did Jezreel’s name represent a judgment on (Hos 1:4)?
Where would Israel’s bow be broken by God (Hos 1:5)?
What was Gomer’s first daughter named (Hos 1:6)?
How would God show the house of Judah love (Hos 1:7)?
options: Saving them with bow and battle
Delivering them by the hand of their king
Saving them by the Lord their God
Saving them by the sword of Hosea

question: Why does Hosea say “rebuke your mother” (Hos 2:2)?
options: Because she is not his wife
Because she has rejected the ways of the Lord
Because she had rejected her children

question: Why would God not show his love to Isreal’s children (Hos 2:4)?
options: Because they have rebelled against him
Because they have run away from him
Because they have rejected his word
Because they are children of adultery

question: To whom did unfaithful Israel attribute her food and wool (Hos 2:5)?
options: The work of her own hands

question: Who will Israel chase after unsuccessfully (Hos 2:7)?
What did Israel refuse to acknowledge (Hos 2:8)?
options: That she had done anything wrong
That God had given her grain and oil
That God had pursued her with an everylasting love
That God would accept her back

question: God sadi he would stop all of the following in Israel EXCEPT (Hos 2:11)
What did Israel see as payment from her lovers ( Hos 2:12)?
To where would God allure his wayward bride Israel (Hos 2:14)?
options: To a shaded grove of sycamore trees

question: What would God make a door of hope for Israel (Hos 2:15)?
When did God look back and remember Israel singing to him (Hos 2:15)?
options: When they were fed with manna in the wilderness
On the day David was anointed king
On the day they came out of Egypt
On the day when the temple was built

question: In “that day” what would Israel call the Lord (Hos 2:16)?
In “that day” what would Israel NOT call the Lord (Hos 2:16)?
What did God say he would remove from Israel’s lips (Hos 2:17)?
options: The voice of want and need

question: When God betroths Israel in faithfulness what will be Isarel’s response (Hos 2:20)?
options: They will offer sacrifices is the Lord’s name
They will turn to the Lord

question: What will do for the one called “Not my loved one” (Hos 2:23)?
options: He will plant her in Zion
He will show his love to her

question: What will God call those he called “Not my people” (Hos 2:23)?
Hosea was to love Gomer even as ___________ (Hos 3:1)
options: God loved those who have rebelled against him
God has loved the whole world even though the world rejected him
God has love Israelites who have turned to other gods
God has sent rain on the just and the unjust

question: For how much did Hosea buy Gomer back (Hos 3:2)?
options: Thirty pieces of silver and a hin of oil
Five pieces of gold and a basket of summer fruit
Fifteen pieces of silver and some barley
Two hundred loaves of bread and a hin of oil

question: What is the Lord bringing against the Israelites (Hos 4:1)?
God said all of the following were not found in the land EXCEPT (Hos 4:1)
Why did God say he would ignore their children (Hos 4:6)?
options: Because they had ignored his law
Because they had ignored the poor

question: What did the priest exchange for something disgraceful (Hos 4:7)?
What did God say the people were like (Hos 4:9)?
Where does Israel sacrifice (Hos 4:13)?
To what do Israel’s daughters-in-law turn (Hos 4:13)?
With whom/what do the men of Israel sacrifice (Hos 4:14)?
Even when their drinks are gone what do they continue (Hos 4:18)?
Where had the priests and royal house been a snare (Hos 5:1)?
What did God say Ephraim had turned to (Hos 5:3)?
What did God say did not permit Israel to return to their God (Hos 5:4)?
What did God say was in Israel’s heart (Hos 5:4)?
Why will Israel not find the Lord after seeking him (Hos 5:6)?
options: He has hid himself in a dark cloud
He has withdrawn himself from them
He has turned away from them
He has closed his ears to their cries

question: Like what will God pour out his wrath on the leaders of Israel (Hos 5:10)?
What did God say he would be like to Ephraim (Hos 5:12)?
What could the great king of Assyria not do (Hos 5:13)?
What would God be like to Ephraim (Hos 5:14)?
What did the repentant person hope God would do in the healing process (Hos 6:1)?
options: Remove the rod from their backs

question: Why would the Lord restore those who were coming back to the Lord (Hos 6:2)?
options: So that they may worship the Lord
So that they may live in his presence
So that they may serve him in spirit and truth
So that they may love him again

question: How did those returning describe God’s coming to them (Hos 6:3)?
options: Like a great harvest of new wine
Like the spring rains that water the earth
Like the snow that refreshes the earth

question: With what does God say he will cut Ephraim and Judah in pieces (Hos 6:5)?
With what does God say he will kill Ephraim and Judah (Hos 6:5)?
What did God desire rather than sacrifice (Hos 6:6)?

What do the bands of priests do (Hos 6:9)?

Ephraim is given to what sin (Hos 6:10)?
What God goes to heal Israel what are revealed (Hos 7:1)?
What metaphor does God use to describe Israel’s adulterers (Hos 7:4)?
options: They are like a burning oven
They are like an unpredictable wind

question: What do the Israelites devour (Hos 7:7)?
In his arrogance what does Israel not do (Hos 7:10)?
Because Ephraim has rebelled what awaits them (Hos 7:13)?
What does God long to do for Ephraim but they speak lies against him (Hos 7:13)?

What country will ridicule Israel (Hos 7:16)?
Why is an eagle over the house of the Lord (Hos 8:1)?

Because they will be judged by God
Because God sees all that they are doing

question: What did the Israelites make with their silver and gold (Hos 8:4)?
What idol does God command Samaria to throw out (Hos 8:5)?
Who made the calf-idol of Samaria (Hos 8:6)?
What did God say those who sow the wind will reap (Hos 8:7)?
Where has Israel gone like a wild donkey (Hos 8:9)?

options: He will send the sword after them

question: What did Ephraim’s altars for sin offerings become (Hos 8:11)?
How did Ephraim view the things God wrote in his law (Hos 8:12)?
Who has Israel forgotten (Hos 8:14)?
What will God send on the fortified town of Judah (Hos 8:14)?
Why should Israel not rejoice and be jubilant (Hos 9:1)?
options: Because the Day of the Lord is approaching
Because they have been unfaithful to their God
Because they will die in their sins

question: What does Israel love (Hos 9:1)?
Even if they escape destruction who will bury the Israelites (Hos 9:6)?
By what will Ephraim’s treasures of silver be taken over by (Hos 9:6)?
Who is considered a fool in Israel (Hos 9:7)?
What is the prophet over Ephraim (Hos 9:8)?
Israel has sunk deep into corruption as in what days (Hos 9:9)?
Why will God punish Israel (Hos 9:9)?
options: Because they have ignored his word
Because they have defiled his priests

question: Israel became as vile as __________ (Hos 9:10)?
options: One who burns a neighbors field

question: Where did Israel consecrate themselves to a shameful idol (Hos 9:10)?
What will fly away like a bird (Hos 9:11)?
What city is Ephraim like being planted in a pleasant place (Hos 9:13)?
What does Hosea pray that God gives Ephraim (Hos 9:14)?
What did God say he would no longer do to Ephraim (Hos 9:15)?
What did God say he did to Ephraim at Gilgal (Hos 9:15)?
Why did God hate Ephraim at Gilgal (Hos 9:15)?
How was Israel portrayed with more fruit more altars (Hos 10:1)?
What did Israelites do as their land prospered (Hos 10:1)?
options: They offered more sacrifices to Baal

question: What will the Lord destroy (Hos 10:2)?
For what do the people of Samaria fear (Hos 10:5)?
Who will mourn over the calf-idol of Beth Aven (Hos 10:5)?
Why will the idolatrous priests mourn over the calf-idol of Beth Aven (Hos 10:5)?
options: Because it will be ground into dust
Because it will be melted down
Because it will be taken into exile
Because it will be smashed with the hammer of Assyria

question: What will float away like a twig on the surface of the waters (Hos 10:7)?
When Ephraim’s altars are covered with thistles what will they say (Hos 10:8)?
What would God do to the heifer Ephraim (Hos 10:11)?
options: Put her in a stall with no food
Put a yoke on her neck
Let her be sacrificed to her gods
Make her pull a cart to Assyria

question: If Israel sows righteousness what will they reap (Hos 10:12)?
What time does Hosea say it is (Hos 10:12)?
Israel is to seek God until he showers what on them (Hos 10:12)?
Whose wickedness is great bringing judgement on them (Hos 10:15)?
When that day dawns who will be completely destroyed (Hos 10:15)?
Where did God call his son from (Hos 11:1)?
What happened the more God called Israel (Hos 11:2)?
options: The further they went away from him
The more they stopped their ears
The further they fled to the high places
The more they spurned the Lord

question: To whom did Israel sacrifice (Hos 11:2)?
With what did God lead Israel (Hos 11:4)?
Why will Assyria rule over Israel (Hos 11:5)?
options: Because they run after Shalman as their king
Because they like it that way

question: What are God’s people determined to do (Hos 11:7)?
God laments, “How can I treat you like _______?” (Hos 11:8)?
God laments, “How can I make you like ______?” (Hos 11:8)?
What does God say is changed within him (Hos 11:8)?
How will Israel come back to God trembling (Hos 11:11)?
options: Like an ox to the pen

question: On what does Ephraim feed (Hos 12:1)?
What does Ephraim pursue all day (Hos 12:1)?
To whom does Ephraim send olive oil (Hos 12:1)?
According to what will Jacob be punished (Hos 12:2)?
options: According to the law of Moses

question: What did Jacob do in his mother’s womb (Hos 12:3)?
Where did Jacob find and talk with the Lord (Hos 12:4)?
What did Ephraim think would his wealth would do for him (Hos 12:8)?

options: El Shaddai, the Lord God almighty
The Lord your God who brought you out of Egypt
Emmanuel who is with you from now and forever more
The God of your fathers, maker of heaven and earth

question: What does God say about the people of Gilead (Hos 12:11)?
options: They are made in his image

question: What place/people are wicked (Hos 12:11)?
To what country did Jacob flee (Hos 12:12)?
For what will the Lord repay Ephraim (Hos 12:14)?
What happened when Ephraim spoke (Hos 13:1)?
When did Ephraim die (Hos 13:1)?
options: When they became guilty of Baal worship
When they rejected the Lord their God

question: From what do they cleverly fashion their idols (Hos 13:2)?
What do these people kiss (Hos 13:2)?
Why does God say they should acknowledge no other God than he (Hos 13:4)?
options: He alone is God there is no other
He is the one who brought them out of Egypt
He is the one who gave them the law
He has guided them since their youth

question: When they were proud what did they do to God (Hos 13:6)?
What had Israel demanded from God (Hos 13:10)?
How had God given them a king (Hos 13:11)?
What will come from the Lord against Ephraim (Hos 13:15)?
What will happen to Ephraim’s storehouses (Hos 13:15)?
options: They will be full of rotten grain

question: What will happen to pregnant women (Hos 13:16)?
options: They will be beaten to death
They will be given miscarrying wombs

question: What has been Israel’s downfall (Hos 14:1)?
Who finds compassion in the Lord (Hos 14:3)?
In returning to the Lord Israel should acknowledge who cannot save them (Hos 14:3)?
Like what will Israel send down roots (Hos 14:5)?
options: Like an oak of the Arnon

question: What will Israel’s fame be like (Hos 14:7)?
